seoTitle: Frogmore vs Frogs Hollow — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Frogmore and Frogs Hollow. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Frogmore vs Frogs Hollow: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Frogmore and Frogs Hollow.
heading: Frogmore vs Frogs Hollow — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Frogmore, New South Wales and Frogs Hollow, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Frogmore has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Frogs Hollow (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Frogmore or Frogs Hollow safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Frogmore has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Frogs Hollow scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Frogmore scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Frogs Hollow scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Frogmore or Frogs Hollow?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Frogmore has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
